term: Taking on a life of its own
pronunciation: /ˈteɪ.kɪŋ ɒn ə laɪf əv ɪts oʊn/
englishDefinitions: growing and changing in a way that seems beyond the original control or intention
persianTranslation: رشد کردن و شکل مستقل گرفتن
examples: The rumor started small but soon took on a life of its own.
The conversation was taking on a life of its own.
The project began taking on a life of its own after launch.
